ai.title: Cannot Exclude™
ai.summary: A satirical radiology hedging engine. Paste a normal report, pick an intensity tier, watch clinical certainty become defensible uncertainty. A weekend build mirroring how radiologists communicate - LLM proxy, rate limiting, and bot protection on a serverless edge stack.

ai.title: Artemis II Interactive Guide
ai.summary: An interactive web guide teaching orbital mechanics through NASA's Artemis II mission. Four chapters covering orbits, trans-lunar injection, gravity assists, and reentry - built as a creative side project to demonstrate technical storytelling outside the medical domain.
